note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). All scenarios drive the real RunnerWorkflow in the Temporal in-process test env.

scenarios.name: An ingested incident flows to a sealed gated proposal with no mutation
The action_id is threaded from derivation through the sealed manifest
An incident the agent cannot propose for ends without an action
An approved poll threads the human authorization into the execute path
A denied poll stands the session down without mutation
An unanswered poll times out to deny — never a silent approval
A vote bound to a different action is recorded and ignored — it releases nothing
The interceptor's effect leaf is read-only by default and inert while mutation is off
A gated execution binds evidence, wires an observer, and constructs the argv
A mispredicted post-state verifies as a deviation, not a clean match
Precedent ranked by both channels fuses above single-channel precedent
A semantic match below the similarity floor never enters the seed
Retrieval without an embedding model is exactly the lexical behavior
An embedding outage degrades that query to the lexical ranking
The seed wraps each block in a typed envelope and a forged guidance delimiter is neutralized
A finished session drives a terminal ticket close-out on the governance ledger
A confirmed-clear auto session is closed out to Done
A terminal reconcile never auto-closes an executed action whose post-state deviated
An unanswered poll hands the orphaned incident off to the escalation re-check lane
The scheduled FireDue cron fires every due escalation re-check
A FireDue error is captured and never crashes the cron run
A persistently failing pipeline activity is retried a bounded number of times then surfaces
A session that exhausts its wall-clock budget stops to the terminal human-handoff
